prompts.title: Existing workflow under pressure
prompts.prompt: Use Launch Plan Generator to produce a launch plan with sequencing, owners, deliverables, decision gates, and post-launch follow-up for the current workstream.
minimum_expectations: State the workflow objective in plain language.
Produce a launch plan with sequencing, owners, deliverables, decision gates, and post-launch follow-up with explicit structure.
Call out missing information and the next decision.

prompts.title: Partial inputs
prompts.prompt: Draft the strongest version of a launch plan with sequencing, owners, deliverables, decision gates, and post-launch follow-up using only the available inputs and list what is missing.
minimum_expectations: Keep the output usable even when some inputs are missing.

prompts.title: Decision review
prompts.prompt: Summarize the output from Launch Plan Generator for an operator or leader who needs the decision-ready version.
minimum_expectations: Highlight the recommendation or key conclusion.
